title: glyptopetalum calocarpum
intro: Glyptopetalum calocarpum, also known as the wild cotton tree, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Glyptopetalum calocarpum include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease and alleviate symptoms of fever and pain. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
